title: Nightfall SMP Modpack
description: A modpacks that adds several mods that are frequently used by the players of the Nightfall SMP server.
body:
# Nightfall SMP Modpack

Nightfall SMP Modpack is a modpack for the Nightfall SMP server which has several optimization mods as well as certain mods for the good running of the features introduced on the server.

## Nightfall Specifics
We have Better Tricky Trials that changes the chests of several structures to be vault instead. Each vault sets have their own vault keys.

## Optimizations / Performances
We have several mods that increase performances and optimise Minecraft to be more suitable for lighter configurations, notably, Lithium, Sodium, and several others.

## Social
We have some mods to give better social experience like Simple Voice Chat and Voice Chat Interaction, just to scare players when they speak in the deep dark.

## UI
We have some mods that revamps Minecraft's UIs and add new overlay to allow players to see more informations faster. Minimap, Armor Statuses, Shulker Boxes content, and several others.

## Utility
We have some mods that have their own goals. For example: Mod Menu, Litematica, Tweakeroo, World Edit and several others.

## Misc
We have a small amount of mods that varies in goal like, Iris Shaders and Model Gap Fix.

List of all the mods:
